sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47073" key="h(mi/delta" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμί-δελτα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n47073.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">half-delta</tr_>, a musical note, <*>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2135.tlg001:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alyp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
